FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES CoIMIssIoN
PC). Bo Xfl7
428
.1 Street
Sacramento, CA 958(2-0807
(9161 322-5660
Fax (9161 322-0886
Allen K. Settle
Mayor
City of San Luis Obispo
990 Palm Street
San Luis Obispo, California 93401-3249
Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 99-309
Dear Mr; Settle:
March 29, 2000
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the conflict of interest
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).
1 The Act requires the Commission to provide
written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person’s
authorized representative. (Section 83114(b); Regulation 18329(a).) However, under 2 Cal.
Code of Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(A), the Commission may decline to provide written
advice where the requestor is seeking advice relating to past conduct.
After a careful review of the facts which you provided to us, the Commission has
determined that your request involves one or more such issues. Therefore, we are unable to
provide formal assistance with respect to the issues you raise in your letter.
Government Code sections 8T000 - 91015.
18996, of the California Code of Regulations.
Commission regulations appear at!tle 2, sections 18109
-


File No. 99-309
Page 2
If you have any further questions regarding this matter, please feel free to contact me or
Luisa Menchaca, Assistant General Counsel, at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel
//
)
.(

By/\

Staff Counsel, Legal Division

sections.question_synthetic: The requestor (Mayor Allen K. Settle) sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but the specific details of the legal question are not provided in this declination letter.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declined to provide formal written advice because the request involved issues relating to past conduct, which falls under the exception in California Code of Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(A).
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a declination letter with no substantive question or conclusion sections. The document states reasons for declining to provide advice (past conduct exception) but does not contain the original question posed by the requestor. FPPC response confirmed by letterhead and official response language.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: The requestor (Mayor Allen K. Settle) sought advice regarding conflict of interest provisions under the Political Reform Act, but the specific details of the legal question are not provided in this declination letter.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC declined to provide formal written advice because the request involved issues relating to past conduct, which falls under the exception in California Code of Regulations Section 18329(b)(8)(A).

embedding.summary: The FPPC declined Mayor Allen K. Settle's request for formal written advice regarding Political Reform Act conflict of interest provisions, determining that the request involved past conduct issues that preclude written advice under applicable regulations.
